headline: 180,000 refugees lack legal status in Malaysia
context: UNHCR Malaysia reported approximately 180,000 registered refugees and asylum seekers in Malaysia as of January 2025, none with formal legal status.

cards.big: 180,000 UNHCR-registered refugees have zero legal protection in Malaysia
cards.sub: Malaysia has not ratified the 1951 Refugee Convention

cards.big: Immigration Act 1959 treats refugees as illegal immigrants subject to detention
cards.sub: No domestic legislation distinguishes refugees from undocumented migrants

cards.big: Refugee children denied access to 7,800 national schools across Malaysia
cards.sub: Right to education under CRC not extended to non-citizen children

cards.big: An estimated 45,000 refugee children have no access to formal schooling
cards.sub: Community learning centres operate without government funding or recognition

cards.big: Without legal framework, 180,000 people exist in permanent vulnerability
Cabinet discussed refugee policy framework 3 times since 2020 with no outcome
